creator: empty.japan
caption:
Have you watched “The Tale of the Princess Kaguya” from studio Ghibli? (かぐや姫の物語)
It is a story about a girl who has been found inside a glowing bamboo shoot.
Even neighborhood kids called her Takenoko - bamboo shoot.
There is one place in Japan that so strongly reminds me of this film.
Kayabuki No Sato かやぶきの里 - small charming village located in the northern part of Kyoto Prefecture. It is surrounded by beautiful nature including forests, mountains and rivers.
One more reason to love this place (especially now) - it is not overloaded with tourists compared to Kyoto. I absolutely love visiting this place, especially early in the morning 🥹
